Description: ESP32-S3 dual-core LX7 SoC, 2.4GHz WiFi 802.11b/g/n, BT5.0, QFN56
USB Full-Speed (12Mbps) to UART bridge, 3.3V I/O, QFN28
6-pin SPI header (GND MOSI MISO CLK CS 3V3)
Reset tactile switch 6x6mm, connects EN to GND
Boot tactile switch 6x6mm, connects GPIO0 to GND
1k ohm 1% 0.1W 0402 — power LED current limit (3.3V always-on)
100nF 10V X5R 0402 — local decoupling on IC VCC pins
10uF 10V X5R 0805 — bulk decoupling (LDO input and output)
